bs-validator-value-not-recognized: Used for error message in dialogs and tags if the value given could not be parsed
bs-validator-invalid-boolean: Used for error message in dialogs and tags if the value given is not a valid boolean
bs-validator-invalid-float: Used for error message in dialogs and tags if the value given is not a valid float
bs-validator-invalid-integer: Used for error message in dialogs and tags if the value given is not a valid integer
bs-validator-invalid-string: Used for error message in dialogs and tags if the value given is not a valid string
bs-validator-invalid-coordinate: Used for error message in dialogs and tags if the value given is not a valid coordinate
bs-validator-invalid-parameter: Used for error message in dialogs and tags if the parameter name given is not allowed
bs-validator-missing-required: Used for error message in dialogs and tags if a required parameter is missing
